title: Reproducibility package + scripts/reproduce.ts re-derivation harness (CI gate)
context: After the core analysis is complete (rates, trends, and disparity measures), the reproducibility harness ensures all published figures and tables can be independently re-derived from pinned inputs — the project's defining quality guarantee. The harness is wired into CI as a blocking gate. Environment, pinned dataset release years, and exact queries must be documented so a second analyst can re-derive results independently. Depends on: disparities-analysis-rates-009, disparities-analysis-disparity-010.
objective: Implement scripts/reproduce.ts as a complete reproducibility harness that: re-runs the full analysis pipeline from pinned inputs (archived raw pulls with checksums from disparities-analysis-acquire-007); asserts that all published figures and tables are reproduced bit-for-bit or within documented tolerance; is wired into CI as a blocking gate that must pass before any release. Document the environment (Python/R/Node versions, library pinning), pinned dataset release years, exact queries, and expected outputs so a second analyst can independently verify results.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/reproduce.ts re-runs the full pipeline from pinned, checksummed inputs and asserts all published figures and tables are reproduced bit-for-bit (or within explicitly documented numerical tolerance for any stochastic step)
Wired into CI as a blocking gate: the CI check fails if any published figure or table cannot be reproduced from the pinned inputs
Environment is fully documented: Python version, R version, Node/pnpm version, all library versions pinned (requirements.txt or lockfile for Python; renv.lock for R; pnpm-lock.yaml for Node)
Pinned dataset release years and exact query parameters are recorded and version-controlled so a second analyst can re-pull the same source data
A second analyst (or CI runner) can execute the harness without manual intervention and reproduce all published outputs
Raw source pulls are mirrored/archived with checksums so the harness remains runnable even if federal portals change or go offline
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass
output: A merged PR adding scripts/reproduce.ts, the complete reproducibility package (pinned environment, pinned data, documented queries), and the CI blocking gate asserting all published figures/tables re-derive correctly.
